revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4135890]])
revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Arabic interwiki (Q4121696)
working on the date checking
Moving from [[Category:Qq]] to [[Category:qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]][[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]][[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]][[ms:22 Rabiulakhir]][[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]][[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]][[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}}

'''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]
[[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]]
[[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]]
[[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]]
[[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]]
[[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]]
[[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]]
[[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121696}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]][[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]][[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]][[ms:22 Rabiulakhir]][[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]][[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]][[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}}
'''Rabi' al-Thani 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:22 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٢ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۲ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[pnb:22 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:22 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:22 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121696}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]
